reviews.review_description: i really like the game but the lion and the other animals are too op, they are too fast and u always need a 100 meters space to play for good, if u can, add some hiding places like closets and bushes, if the game dosent improve in 5 days i am going to get a refund. (if u can could you also make the oculus room setup a way to map your home? it would be easyer to do)

developer_response.body: Hi Leonardo, thank you for the review,  I have been working on FPS Enhanced Reality over the past few months.  Through this game I have been developing a better oculus room setup which I will port over to this game once it has been finalized.  Regarding the difficulty of this game, I could add a mode just for smaller play spaces soon if it that will help, it may probably take me a few days to do. For the setup it may take much longer. Hiding places are a great idea!  Due to the low download amount for Mixed Reality Animal Escape I have allocated all  of my time to FPS Enhanced Reality and Hauntify Mixed Reality.  Please let me know if you would like me to work on adding a mode for small spaces this week.  Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Wow - very intense game. I like this as similar to Hauntify.  Nice Job!
